content.description: Fixed cmd_latest in bin/artifact.sh to sort by createdAt field extracted from JSON content rather than by filename. The old approach used reverse filename sort (ls -1 | sort -r), which fails when artifact filenames have different prefixes (e.g. builder-- vs auditor--). The new approach iterates all files, extracts createdAt via grep/sed (same technique as cmd_list), and selects the file with the lexicographically greatest timestamp.
